race.description: Three Rivers Machinery Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: CHAPPOLICIOUS (12) started favourite when fresh from a spell over this distance at Wellington last start but after leading for the judge was overwhelmed close to home. May take a sit behind a hot tempo this time and with added fitness can get the job done. LINE OF LAW (1) couldn't go with the early pace and was never a factor last time out in a 900m BM66 at Wellington. Perfectly drawn and more at home out to this trip. Watch for a far better run. INVINCIBLE SALEX (11) returned from an 18-week spell in the same race as LINE OF LAW at Wellington and also found the trip a bit sharp. Will sit back and over the longer trip today will be putting in big strides late. ROMANTIC LOVE (6) is back after a 15-week break. Should come to hand quickly and he does enjoy racing here. RACE TO ARMS (5) gets a pass mark for his first-up run. Bolted in second-up last prep so he must be considered.
